title: Pre-final stress test
description: Mixed real-world content at 102 WPM — last warmup before L99
text: One lesson to go. You will face a comprehensive final — long, dense, mixed-content prose covering everything you have learned. This lesson is the warmup: a stress test at 102 WPM with names, numbers, punctuation, and quoted dialogue. "Are you ready?" the trainer asked. "More than ready," you said, hands resting calmly on the home row. "Let's finish this."

tips.text: The last page before the final. Think of it as the warmup, not the test.
Hold 102 a minute here and you're set for lesson 99: longer, denser, 105 a minute.

tips.text: Hands on the home row, a slow breath, and begin. Calm hands type clean.

tips.target: 102 WPM with names, numbers, punctuation, and quoted dialogue. "Are you ready?" the trainer asked. "More than ready," you said, hands resting calmly on the home row. "Let's finish this."

character_tips.anna: One page to go. This is the warmup; settle your hands before the real thing.
character_tips.maxim: The final is next. This is how you loosen up for it. Hands easy, eyes ahead.
character_tips.knopych: The last test is close. This is the warmup that makes it feel routine.
character_tips.klavochka: One step from the finish. Stay calm, stay steady; you've nothing left to prove but this.
